css: :host { display: block; font-family: sans-serif; } .hero { padding: 2rem; background: #f0f4ff; border-radius: 12px; } h1 { color: #1a1a2e; margin: 0 0 .5rem; } p { color: #555; margin: 0 0 1rem; } .actions { display: flex; gap: .75rem; } .cta { display: inline-block; background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; padding: .6rem 1.4rem; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 1rem; } .cta.secondary { background: #fff; color: #4f46e5; border: 1.5px solid #4f46e5; }
